use_cases: Form submission triggers and user interactions across any application interface
Call-to-action buttons in landing pages, dashboards, and marketing sites
Navigation actions like save, cancel, submit, or delete operations
Accessible button component supporting keyboard navigation and focus states
ai_summary: A versatile, reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible styling. Supports multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Features hover states, focus-visible outlines, disabled states, and shadow styling for depth. Designed as an atomic building block for any React application's UI system.
